contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Sophia prod incident: fix Kopi Bay stall cascade (4 bugs)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/195
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/200
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/201
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/203
  
  Details:
  Diagnosed live on prod box ip-10-0-0-158 and fixed 4 distinct bugs in a cascade that stalled Sophia on the Kopi Bay onboarding thread (tg 3926). (1) #195 submit_contribution crashed when DeepSeek double-encoded attributes as a JSON string (AttributeError in _normalize_submission_labels) -> turn died mid tool-loop, orphan tool_call, silent stall. (2) #200 _externalize_tool_result (CM1) returned non-string tool results raw -> recall_context dict -> TypeError unhashable type slice -> streaming turn crash ('incomplete chunked read'). (3) #201 deploy_autopilot had no already-on-latest check -> reset+restart severed in-flight turns -> adapter resubmits -> redeploy loop on the vault thread 3981; added phase-one hash-precheck no-op. (4) #203 vault panel 'Active tracks: 0' — chat turns never registered in deploy_watcher's file registry (read by the separate vault_app process); wired register/unregister around each turn (also hardens can_deploy). All four merged + deployed (box 969f170), each with regression tests; verified live. Also logged in agentic_ai_context CONTEXT_UPDATES.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00

- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
